response.justification: Aisha has extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — all core to the role — though her stack includes non-preferred languages like DLang and lacks explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions, which are mitigated by her adaptability and depth in similar technologies.
strengths: Proven full-stack ownership across frontend and backend with real-world scale
Direct experience with AI-agent development and internal tooling
Strong testing culture and infrastructure expertise (CI/CD, Docker, GitLab)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
Heavy use of DLang may indicate stack divergence from required tech
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting collaboration
